<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Myop FAQ | How builders' code reaches production safely</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Answers to common questions about Myop's pluggable architecture, AI coding agents, engineering governance, and production deployment.">
    <link href="/icons/favicon.svg" rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" />
    <!-- ABC Favorit Light font - ensure this is loaded from your font provider or self-hosted -->
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            touch-action: manipulation;
        }

        a, button, input, textarea, select {
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        html {
            overflow-x: clip;
            max-width: 100%;
        }

        :root {
            --purple-5: #F0E8FF;
            --purple-10: #DECCFF;
            --grey-20: #D3D1D5;
            --white: #FFF;
            --bg-color: #ffffff;
            --panel-bg: #fafafa;
            --border-color: #e5e5e5;
            --text-color: #18181b;
            --text-secondary: #0A090A;
            --accent-blue: #9A70DF;
            --accent-green: #10b981;
            --hover-bg: #f4f4f5;
        }

        body {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-color);
            color: var(--text-color);
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            overflow-x: clip;
            max-width: 100%;
            overscroll-behavior-x: none;
            min-height: auto;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        /* ========== MAIN SCROLLBAR ========== */
        body::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }

        body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
        }

        /* Firefox scrollbar */
        * {
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) transparent;
        }

        /* ========== NAVIGATION ========== */
        nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            padding: 15px 3rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out;
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        nav.nav-hidden {
            transform: translateY(-100%);
        }

        .nav-left {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 44px;
        }

        .logo {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-left: -10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .logo:active {
            opacity: 0.7;
        }

        .logo svg {
            height: 34px;
            width: auto;
        }

        .logo svg .logo-icon {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .logo:hover svg .logo-icon {
                fill: url(#logo-hover-gradient);
            }
        }

        .nav-links-left {
            display: flex;
            gap: 44px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-center {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            gap: 38px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links-right {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .nav-link {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .nav-link svg {
            width: 9px;
            height: 7px;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-link:hover {
                color: var(--accent-blue);
            }
        }

        .nav-cta {
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            border: 1px solid #000000;
            height: 35.5px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-cta:hover {
                background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
                color: var(--text-color);
            }
        }

        /* ========== Nav Dropdown (Redesigned Panel) ========== */
        .nav-dropdown {
            position: static;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-trigger {
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 15px;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 2px;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            padding-left: 2px;
            margin-right: -1.5px;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        @media (hover: hover) {
            .nav-dropdown-trigger:hover {
                color: var(--accent-blue);
            }
        }

        .nav-dropdown-chevron {
            width: 8px;
            height: 6px;
            margin-left: 4.5px;
            margin-top: 3.5px;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-chevron {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel {
            position: fixed;
            top: 55px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
            border-radius: 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
            padding: 28px 32px 32px;
            display: none;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        .nav-dropdown.open .nav-dropdown-panel {
            display: block;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel.products-panel {
            width: 440px;
        }

        .nav-dropdown-panel.resources-panel {
            width: 420px;
        }

        .dropdown-panel-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .dropdown-panel-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: #e8e8e8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 14px;
            padding: 12px 12px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5, #F0E8FF);
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            min-width: 44px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-events"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-faq"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-events"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-faq"]) {
            width: 39.6px;
            height: 39.6px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-playground"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-platforms"]),
        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-marketplace"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-playground"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-platforms"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-marketplace"]) {
            width: 37.62px;
            height: 37.62px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-pricing"]),
        .mobile-rich-icon svg:has(use[href="#ico-pricing"]) {
            width: 33px;
            height: 33px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            min-width: 0;
            padding-top: 4px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-title {
            font-size: 14.5px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.4;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .coming-soon-badge {
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--accent-blue);
            background: var(--purple-5);
            padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 99px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            letter-spacing: 0.3px;
        }

        .community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .community-icon-link {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #f5f5f5;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .community-icon-link:hover {
            background: var(--purple-10);
        }

        .community-icon-link:has(.community-platform-icon):hover {
            background: #f5f5f5;
        }

        .community-icon-link svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .community-platform-icon {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            object-fit: contain;
            display: block;
        }

        /* ========== Hamburger Menu ========== */
        .hamburger {
            display: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .hamburger svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
        }

        /* ========== Mobile Menu ========== */
        .mobile-menu {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: var(--bg-color);
            transform: translateX(100%);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease, visibility 0.3s ease;
            z-index: 200;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            pointer-events: none;
            visibility: hidden;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        .mobile-menu.open {
            transform: translateX(0);
            pointer-events: auto;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        .mobile-menu-header {
            padding: 15px 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            height: 64px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .mobile-menu-close {
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-menu-links {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 2rem 0;
        }

        .mobile-link {
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-link:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-cta {
            margin: 1rem 2rem;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(234deg, #FFE3D6 3.79%, #EEEBFF 70.67%);
            border-radius: 6px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 15px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .mobile-cta:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .mobile-dropdown {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-trigger {
            padding: 1rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            width: 100%;
            text-align: left;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-trigger:hover {
            background: #F9F6FF;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-chevron {
            width: 10px;
            height: 6px;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown.open .mobile-dropdown-chevron {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .mobile-dropdown-menu {
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding-left: 1rem;
        }

        .mobile-dropdown.open .mobile-dropdown-menu {
            display: flex;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px 1rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: background 0.15s ease;
        }

        .mobile-rich-item:hover {
            background: var(--purple-5);
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            min-width: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: transparent;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .mobile-rich-icon svg {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            padding-top: 2px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-title {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .mobile-rich-desc {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #71717a;
            line-height: 1.35;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .mobile-community-icons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        /* ========== Sign-in Modal ========== */
        .signin-modal-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
            z-index: 9999;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .signin-modal-overlay.open {
            display: flex;
        }
        .signin-card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 48px 40px;
            gap: 20px;
            width: 376px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border-radius: 16px;
            position: relative;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }
        .signin-title-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 0 8px;
            gap: 10px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .signin-btn-social {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-social:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-google-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .signin-divider {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 296px;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-divider-line { flex-grow: 1; height: 0; border-top: 1px solid #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-divider-text { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: #B6B5B7; }
        .signin-btn-email {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 296px;
            height: 48px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            align-self: stretch;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-weight: 400;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }
        .signin-btn-email:hover { background: #f5f5f5; }
        .signin-terms-text {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 16px;
            letter-spacing: -0.11px;
            text-align: center;
            align-self: stretch;
        }
        .signin-terms-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-terms-link:hover { color: #6C18FF; text-decoration: underline; }
        .signin-close-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 14px;
            right: 14px;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #999;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 4px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        .signin-close-btn:hover { color: #333; }
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .signin-card { width: calc(100vw - 32px); padding: 40px 24px; }
            .signin-title-row, .signin-btn-social, .signin-divider, .signin-btn-email { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* ========== BACKGROUND GRADIENT ========== */
        .bg-gradient {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            z-index: 0;
            opacity: 0.4;
            background:
                radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.3) 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, rgba(222, 204, 255, 0.2) 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
        }

        /* ========== ANIMATIONS ========== */
        @keyframes fadeInUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(20px);
            }

            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        /* ========== FAQ HERO SECTION ========== */
        .faq-hero {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 160px auto 0;
            padding: 4rem 2rem 2rem;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .faq-hero h1 {
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 3.5rem);
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.2;
            letter-spacing: -2px;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.2s both;
        }

        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-blue), var(--purple-10));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }

        .faq-hero p {
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.125rem);
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto 2rem;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.4s both;
        }

        /* ========== SEARCH BAR ========== */
        .search-container {
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out 0.6s both;
        }

        .search-wrapper {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .search-icon {
            position: absolute;
            left: 1rem;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .search-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 0.875rem 3rem 0.875rem 3rem;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 1rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: var(--white);
            color: var(--text-color);
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .search-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--accent-blue);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.1);
        }

        .search-input::placeholder {
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .clear-search {
            position: absolute;
            right: 1rem;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .clear-search:hover {
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .clear-search.visible {
            display: flex;
        }

        .search-results-info {
            margin-top: 1rem;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            display: none;
        }

        .search-results-info.visible {
            display: block;
        }

        .no-results {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 3rem 2rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            display: none;
        }

        .no-results.visible {
            display: block;
        }

        .no-results-icon {
            font-size: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            opacity: 0.3;
        }

        .no-results h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .no-results p {
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        /* Highlight matched text */
        .highlight {
            background: rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.2);
            padding: 0;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: inherit;
        }

        /* ========== FAQ CONTENT ========== */
        .faq-content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 2rem 2rem 4rem;
        }

        .faq-category {
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px);
            transition: all 0.4s ease-out;
        }

        .faq-category:nth-child(1) {
            transition-delay: 0s;
        }

        .faq-category:nth-child(2) {
            transition-delay: 0.05s;
        }

        .faq-category:nth-child(3) {
            transition-delay: 0.1s;
        }

        .faq-category:nth-child(4) {
            transition-delay: 0.15s;
        }

        .faq-category:nth-child(5) {
            transition-delay: 0.2s;
        }

        .faq-category:nth-child(6) {
            transition-delay: 0.25s;
        }

        .faq-category.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        .category-title {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
            color: var(--text-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            padding-bottom: 0.75rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        .faq-item {
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .faq-item:hover {
            border-color: var(--purple-10);
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.1);
        }

        .faq-question {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            text-align: left;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.0625rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-color);
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 1rem;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .faq-question-text {
            flex: 1;
            text-align: left;
        }

        .faq-question:hover {
            color: var(--accent-blue);
        }

        .faq-icon {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .faq-item.active .faq-icon {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .faq-answer {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
        }

        .faq-answer-content {
            padding: 0 1.5rem 1.5rem 1.5rem;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            line-height: 1.7;
            font-size: 0.9375rem;
        }

        .faq-answer-content p {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .faq-answer-content p:last-child {
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        .faq-answer-content ul {
            margin: 1rem 0;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
        }

        .faq-answer-content li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .faq-answer-content code {
            background: var(--purple-5);
            padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--text-color);
        }

        .faq-answer-content pre {
            background: var(--purple-5);
            padding: 1rem;
            border-radius: 6px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            margin: 1rem 0;
        }

        .faq-answer-content pre code {
            background: transparent;
            padding: 0;
        }

        /* ========== CTA GRADIENT SECTION ========== */
        .cta-gradient-section {
            position: relative;
            padding: 80px 0;
            text-align: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .cta-gradient-section::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 690px;
            height: 200px;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 200% at center top, rgba(255, 160, 100, 0.6) 0%, rgba(255, 180, 150, 0.5) 15%, rgba(255, 200, 200, 0.4) 30%, rgba(220, 180, 240, 0.3) 45%, transparent 60%);
            border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%;
            filter: blur(20px);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .cta-gradient-section .cta-content {
            max-width: 500px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .cta-gradient-section h2 {
            font-size: 40px;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #1a1a1a;
            margin: 0 0 40px 0;
            line-height: 1.2;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
        }

        .cta-button-dark {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 151px;
            height: 40px;
            padding: 0;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            text-decoration: none;
            border-radius: 10px;
            transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .cta-button-dark:hover {
            background: #000;
        }

        /* ========== FOOTER ========== */
        .footer-wrapper {
            background: white;
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .footer-container {
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 40px 24px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .footer-content {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            margin-top: 40px;
            color: #000000;
        }

        .footer-column {
            margin-left: 125px;
        }

        .footer-column h3 {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: 0;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #000000;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-style: normal;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        .footer-column ul {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a {
            color: #0A090A;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        .footer-column ul li a:hover {
            color: #1a1a1a;
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .footer-bottom {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .footer-bottom p {
            color: #5A595B;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "ABC Favorit Light", "ABC Favorit Light Placeholder", sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
        }

        /* ========== RESPONSIVE: Mobile (max-width: 905px) ========== */
        @media (max-width: 905px) {
            nav {
                padding: 15px 1.5rem;
                height: 64px;
            }

            /* Transparent tap indication for logo on mobile */
            .logo {
                -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
            }

            .logo:active {
                opacity: 0.6;
                background: transparent;
            }

            .nav-left,
            .nav-links-center,
            .nav-links-right,
            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }

            .nav-left {
                display: flex;
            }

            .hamburger {
                display: block;
            }

            .faq-hero {
                margin: 112px auto 0;
                padding: 3rem 1.5rem 2rem;
            }

            .faq-content {
                padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem 3rem;
            }

            .category-title {
                font-size: 1.5rem;
            }

            .faq-question {
                font-size: 1rem;
                padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
            }

            .faq-answer-content {
                padding: 0 1.25rem 1.25rem 1.25rem;
                font-size: 0.875rem;
            }

            .faq-category {
                transition: all 0.25s ease-out;
            }

            .faq-category:nth-child(1) {
                transition-delay: 0s;
            }

            .faq-category:nth-child(2) {
                transition-delay: 0.05s;
            }

            .faq-category:nth-child(3) {
                transition-delay: 0.1s;
            }

            .faq-category:nth-child(4) {
                transition-delay: 0.15s;
            }

            .faq-category:nth-child(5) {
                transition-delay: 0.2s;
            }

            .faq-category:nth-child(6) {
                transition-delay: 0.25s;
            }

            .footer-container {
                padding: 20px 20px 40px;
            }

            .footer-content {
                display: grid;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
                gap: 20px;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
                margin-top: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column {
                margin-left: 0;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
            }

            .footer-column:last-child {
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            .footer-column h3 {
                font-size: 14px;
                margin-bottom: 16px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li a {
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .footer-column ul li {
                margin-bottom: 12px;
            }

            .footer-bottom p {
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            /* Mobile styles for CTA Gradient Section */
            .cta-gradient-section {
                padding: 64px 20px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section::before {
                width: 100%;
                height: 150px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section h2 {
                font-size: 32px;
            }

            .cta-gradient-section h2 br {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 906px) {
            .mobile-menu {
                display: none;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

    <!-- FAQ Content -->
    <section class="faq-content">
        <!-- Getting Started -->
        <div class="faq-category">
            <h2 class="category-title">Getting Started</h2>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
                    <span class="faq-question-text">What is Myop?</span>
                    <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <path d="M19 9L12 16L5 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-answer">
                    <div class="faq-answer-content">
                        <p>Myop is a pluggable front-end layer that lets teams connect AI-generated or external components directly into mature applications.</p>
                        <p>Instead of copying AI code into the repository, opening a PR, and redeploying for every change, Myop turns AI-built components into structured, installable packages. These packages plug into the app through a controlled container that isolates the component from core business logic.</p>
                        <p>With a one-time setup, components can be updated, versioned, segmented, rolled out, or rolled back without reopening the codebase.</p>
                        <p>Myop's vision is to open the door for builders to work inside real products. To make changes, optimize experiences, and maximize revenue without pulling engineering into every iteration.</p>
                        <p><strong>Builders focus on the experience layer.<br>Engineering keeps control of the system.</strong></p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
                    <span class="faq-question-text">How does Myop actually work under the hood?</span>
                    <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <path d="M19 9L12 16L5 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-answer">
                    <div class="faq-answer-content">
                        <p>Myop takes AI-generated builder's code from Claude, Gemini, Cursor, or its own agent and turns it into a structured, installable npm package.</p>
                        <p>When a builder completes a component, Myop automatically generates a standalone package. Engineering installs it like any other dependency, imports it into the app, and connects it to real data and business logic through controlled props and defined interfaces.</p>
                        <p>There are no modifications to core logic and no complex merge flows. From the developer's perspective, it behaves like a standard shared library.</p>
                        <p>Once installed, the component can be tested, versioned, replaced, and rolled out without rewriting core system code.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
                    <span class="faq-question-text">How do I start as a non-developer?</span>
                    <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <path d="M19 9L12 16L5 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-answer">
                    <div class="faq-answer-content">
                        <p>As a builder (PM, designer, growth manager), you don't need to work in the codebase. The flow is simple:</p>
                        <p><strong>Build:</strong><br>
                        Use any AI tool such as Claude, Gemini, Cursor, or Myop's agent to generate your component.</p>
                        <p>When building outside of Myop, you can use the Myop MCP (Model Context Protocol) or our curated prompt to guide the AI to generate components that already follow Myop's structure and requirements. This makes the output easier to connect later.</p>
                        <p><strong>Upload:</strong> Copy the component code to Myop through the dashboard or via MCP integration.</p>
                        <p><strong>Connect once:</strong> Myop generates either an npm package or a short snippet that connects the component to your app. This is a one-time setup. Share it with a developer or invite them to your Myop workspace.</p>
                        <p><strong>Deploy:</strong> Use the Myop rollout board to release the component to the environments you choose.</p>
                        <p><strong>Optimize:</strong> From that point on, builders can control the UI and UX: run A/B tests, segment experiences, roll out new versions gradually, or roll back instantly. Changes to the interface no longer require engineering involvement for every iteration.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
                    <span class="faq-question-text">What is Myop MCP?</span>
                    <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                        <path d="M19 9L12 16L5 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-answer">
                    <div class="faq-answer-content">
                        <p>Myop MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a bridge between AI coding tools and the Myop platform. It gives AI tools the context they need to generate components that fit Myop's model.</p>
                        <p><strong>How it works:</strong></p>
                        <ul>
                            <li>Connect your AI tool (such as Claude) to Myop via MCP.</li>
                            <li>Describe what you want to build in plain language.</li>
                            <li>The AI generates the component and uploads it directly to Myop.</li>
                            <li>Preview, test, and deploy using the Myop dashboard.</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-question" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
                    <span class="faq-question-text">How do I start as a developer?</span>
                    <svg class="faq-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

            const answer = faqItem.querySelector('.faq-answer');
            const answerContent = faqItem.querySelector('.faq-answer-content');

            // Store the current scroll position and item position before any changes
            const scrollY = window.scrollY;
            const itemOffsetTop = faqItem.offsetTop;

            // Close all other items
            document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(item => {
                if (item !== faqItem && item.classList.contains('active')) {
                    item.classList.remove('active');
                    const otherAnswer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer');
                    otherAnswer.style.maxHeight = null;
                }
            });

            // Toggle current item
            faqItem.classList.toggle('active');

            if (faqItem.classList.contains('active')) {
                answer.style.maxHeight = answerContent.scrollHeight + 'px';

                // After DOM updates, ensure the clicked item stays in the same visual position
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    const newItemOffsetTop = faqItem.offsetTop;
                    const offsetDiff = newItemOffsetTop - itemOffsetTop;

                    // Adjust scroll to compensate for layout shift
                    if (offsetDiff !== 0) {
                        window.scrollTo({
                            top: scrollY + offsetDiff,
                            behavior: 'instant'
                        });
                    }
                });
            } else {
                answer.style.maxHeight = null;
            }
        }

        // FAQ categories scroll animation
        (function() {
            const observerOptions = {
                threshold: 0.1,
                rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
            };

            const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
                    }
                });
            }, observerOptions);

            document.querySelectorAll('.faq-category').forEach(category => {
                observer.observe(category);
            });
        })();

        // Search functionality
        (function() {
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('faqSearch');
            const clearButton = document.getElementById('clearSearch');
            const searchResultsInfo = document.getElementById('searchResultsInfo');
            const noResults = document.getElementById('noResults');
            const faqCategories = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-category');
            const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');

            // Store original content for each FAQ item
            const originalContent = new Map();
            faqItems.forEach(item => {
                const question = item.querySelector('.faq-question');
                const questionTextEl = question.querySelector('.faq-question-text');
                const answer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer-content');
                
                // If no wrapper span exists, create one
                if (!questionTextEl) {
                    const iconEl = question.querySelector('.faq-icon');
                    const textContent = Array.from(question.childNodes)
                        .filter(node => node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE)
                        .map(node => node.textContent)
                        .join('')
                        .trim();
                    
                    question.innerHTML = '';
                    const span = document.createElement('span');
                    span.className = 'faq-question-text';
                    span.textContent = textContent;
                    question.appendChild(span);
                    question.appendChild(iconEl);
                }
                
                const questionText = question.querySelector('.faq-question-text');
                originalContent.set(item, {
                    questionHTML: questionText.innerHTML,
                    answerHTML: answer.innerHTML,
                    questionText: questionText.textContent.toLowerCase(),
                    answerText: answer.textContent.toLowerCase()
                });
            });

            function highlightText(text, query) {
                if (!query) return text;
                
                const regex = new RegExp(`(${query.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')})`, 'gi');
                return text.replace(regex, '<span class="highlight">$1</span>');
            }

            function searchFAQs() {
                const query = searchInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
                
                // Show/hide clear button
                if (query) {
                    clearButton.classList.add('visible');
                } else {
                    clearButton.classList.remove('visible');
                }

                // If empty query, show all items
                if (!query) {
                    faqCategories.forEach(category => {
                        category.style.display = '';
                    });
                    faqItems.forEach(item => {
                        item.style.display = '';
                        // Restore original content
                        const original = originalContent.get(item);
                        const questionText = item.querySelector('.faq-question-text');
                        const answer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer-content');
                        
                        questionText.innerHTML = original.questionHTML;
                        answer.innerHTML = original.answerHTML;
                        
                        // Collapse all accordions when search is empty
                        if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                            item.classList.remove('active');
                            const answerElement = item.querySelector('.faq-answer');
                            answerElement.style.maxHeight = null;
                        }
                    });
                    searchResultsInfo.classList.remove('visible');
                    noResults.classList.remove('visible');
                    return;
                }

                let visibleCount = 0;
                const matchedCategories = new Set();

                // Search through FAQ items
                faqItems.forEach(item => {
                    const original = originalContent.get(item);
                    const questionTextLower = original.questionText;
                    const answerTextLower = original.answerText;
                    const category = item.closest('.faq-category');
                    
                    // Check if query matches question or answer
                    if (questionTextLower.includes(query) || answerTextLower.includes(query)) {
                        item.style.display = '';
                        visibleCount++;
                        matchedCategories.add(category);
                        
                        // Highlight matches
                        const questionText = item.querySelector('.faq-question-text');
                        const answer = item.querySelector('.faq-answer-content');
                        
                        // Highlight question text
                        const highlightedQuestion = highlightText(original.questionHTML, query);
                        questionText.innerHTML = highlightedQuestion;
                        
                        // Highlight answer
                        const highlightedAnswer = highlightText(original.answerHTML, query);
                        answer.innerHTML = highlightedAnswer;
                        
                        // Auto-expand matching items
                        if (!item.classList.contains('active')) {
                            const answerElement = item.querySelector('.faq-answer');
                            item.classList.add('active');
                            answerElement.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
                        }
                    } else {
                        item.style.display = 'none';
                        // Close non-matching items
                        if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                            item.classList.remove('active');
                            const answerElement = item.querySelector('.faq-answer');
                            answerElement.style.maxHeight = null;
                        }
                    }
                });

                // Show/hide categories based on matches
                faqCategories.forEach(category => {
                    if (matchedCategories.has(category)) {
                        category.style.display = '';
                    } else {
                        category.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });

                // Update search results info
                if (visibleCount > 0) {
                    searchResultsInfo.textContent = `Found ${visibleCount} result${visibleCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''} for "${searchInput.value}"`;
                    searchResultsInfo.classList.add('visible');
                    noResults.classList.remove('visible');
                } else {
                    searchResultsInfo.classList.remove('visible');
                    noResults.classList.add('visible');
                }
            }

            function clearSearch() {
                searchInput.value = '';
                searchInput.focus();
                searchFAQs();
            }

            // Event listeners
            searchInput.addEventListener('input', searchFAQs);
            clearButton.addEventListener('click', clearSearch);
            
            // Clear search on Escape key
            searchInput.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    clearSearch();
                }
            });
        })();

        // ===== Sticky Navigation with Show/Hide on Scroll =====
        (function() {
            const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
            let lastScrollTop = 0;
            let scrollThreshold = 5;
            let isNavHidden = false;

            window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
                const scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

                if (Math.abs(scrollTop - lastScrollTop) < scrollThreshold) return;

                if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
                    if (!isNavHidden) {
                        nav.classList.add('nav-hidden');
                        isNavHidden = true;
                    }
                } else if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
                    if (isNavHidden) {
                        nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                        isNavHidden = false;
                    }
                }

                if (scrollTop <= 0) {
                    nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = false;
                }

                lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
            }, { passive: true });
        })();

        // ===== Navigation Dropdowns (Products & Resources) =====
        (function() {
            document.getElementById('productsDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.dropdown-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.dropdown-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('productsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.mobile-rich-item')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.closest('.mobile-rich-item') || e.target.closest('.community-icon-link')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.addEventListener('click', function() {
                document.getElementById('productsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
                document.getElementById('resourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileProductsDropdown').classList.remove('open');
                document.getElementById('mobileResourcesDropdown').classList.remove('open');
            });

            // Position dropdown panels just below nav
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown-panel').forEach(function(panel) {
                panel.style.setProperty('top', '55px', 'important');
            });
        })();
    </script>

    <!-- Myop Public API -->
    <script>
    (function() {
        // Current state storage
        let currentState = null;

        /**
         * myop_init_interface - receives the full config object for the whole data of the interface
         * @param {Object} data - The configuration data for the interface
         * @returns {Object|undefined} - Returns current state if called without arguments
         */
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) {
                return currentState;
            }
            currentState = data;
            console.log('[myop_init_interface] Initialized with data:', data);
            return undefined;
        };

        /**
         * myop_cta_handler - receives all CTA calls with action_id and payload
         * @param {string} action_id - The identifier for the action
         * @param {Object} payload - The payload data for the action
         */
        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            console.log('[myop_cta_handler] Action:', action_id, 'Payload:', payload);
        };
    })();
    </script>

    <!-- Preview script - replaced in production -->
    <script id="myop_preview">
        window.myop_init_interface({});
    </script>
</body>
